gaps.description: Single `ask()` function with provider/apiKey — core value prop is implemented
Search tool (Tavily + Serper) with structured sources/images output
Anthropic and OpenAI provider support with zero-config defaults
Multi-round tool loop exits after first tool round instead of continuing up to MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS — vision implies full agentic loop but current impl forces final answer after one tool round
images field missing from final return in the tool-round path (ask.ts:68) — allImages collected but not returned
No npm-published package / README install instructions — vision says `npm install agentic-lite` but package is not yet published
No system prompt support — users cannot customize agent persona or instructions
